name: EdwMbrDSpiraBnftIdUpdateExtr

text.value: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_edw_staging}.TMP_EdwMbrDSpiraBnftIdUpdateExtr;WITH cte_in AS (SELECT m.MBR_SK, CASE WHEN s.SPIRA_BNF_ID = 'CLNC' THEN 'CLNC' ELSE 'NA' END AS spira_stage1 FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.mbr_d m LEFT JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.mbr_enr_d e ON m.mbr_sk = e.mbr_sk AND e.mbr_enr_elig_in = 'Y' AND e.mbr_enr_term_dt_sk >= '@{pipeline().parameters.CurrentDate}' AND e.mbr_enr_eff_dt_sk <= '@{pipeline().parameters.CurrentDate}' AND e.mbr_enr_cls_pln_prod_cat_cd = 'MED' LEFT JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.PROD_DSGN_SUM_F s ON s.PROD_SK = e.PROD_SK AND s.PROD_CMPNT_EFF_DT_SK <= '@{pipeline().parameters.CurrentDate}' AND s.PROD_CMPNT_TERM_DT_SK >= '@{pipeline().parameters.CurrentDate}' WHERE m.SPIRA_BNF_ID <> COALESCE(s.SPIRA_BNF_ID,'NA')), cte_transform AS (SELECT MBR_SK, CASE WHEN dbo.trim_default(CASE WHEN spira_stage1 IS NOT NULL THEN spira_stage1 ELSE '' END) = '' THEN 'NA' ELSE spira_stage1 END AS SPIRA_BNF_ID FROM cte_in) SELECT MBR_SK, SPIRA_BNF_ID INTO @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_edw_staging}.TMP_EdwMbrDSpiraBnftIdUpdateExtr FROM cte_transform

UPDATE M SET M.SPIRA_BNF_ID = T.SPIRA_BNF_ID FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.mbr_d M INNER JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_edw_staging}.TMP_EdwMbrDSpiraBnftIdUpdateExtr T ON M.MBR_SK = T.MBR_SK

Description:

JOB NAME:   EdwMbrDSpiraBnftIdUpdateExtr
Called By:  EdwMbrExtrLoadDriverSeq

DESCRIPTION:  
  Pull SPIRA_BNF_ID column from from edw tables and update the field.

Annotations:
Job Name: EdwMbrDSpiraBnftIdUpdateExtr
This Job updates the SPIRA_BNF_ID column in the EDW Table MBR_D after the table is populated.
